blocks.text: Riido task: RIID-4636 `[Daemon] 기존 riido_daemon daemon 마이그레이션 계획/문서화`.
This entrypoint defines how the daemon/runtime part of the former private `riido_daemon` repository moves into public `riido-daemon`.

`riido-daemon` owns customer-PC daemon runtime, local host integration, and provider execution boundary. It must stay public, store-reviewable, and free of non-Riido dependencies unless a later ADR explicitly changes that rule.
